commands.name: probe
commands.description: Probe a video's container/streams with ffprobe -> duration, fps, resolution, codecs, has_audio.

commands.name: transcribe
commands.description: Transcribe a video/audio file to timestamped segments with faster-whisper. Write the transcript to a file so later steps can read it.

commands.name: sentiment_segments
commands.description: Group a transcript's segments into consecutive runs of the same sentiment, with timestamp ranges. Reads the transcript from transcribe (no positional source arg).

commands.name: extract_frames
commands.description: Extract frames from a video - one frame at --at T, or N evenly-spaced frames over --range START END. Then attach the returned paths with read_image.

commands.name: keyframes
commands.description: Extract representative keyframes (I-frames) from a video - one image per visual change. Then attach them with read_image.
